description: Style NoteHit the gym with these skin tight leggings from french connection to ensure a good workout session.  If you wish to go casual, simply pair them with a long, stylish top or a kurta.Product DetailsBlack leggings with a soft and broad elastic waist Material and Care95% cotton and 5% elastane/ spandexMachine wash cold with similar coloursDry away from direct sunlightDo not pile whilst dampSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 8
